item.title: OpenClaw source acquisition and version pinning
steps: Decide and document the acquisition strategy: git clone pinned tag vs. release tarball download (open decision — Tech Lead must resolve)
Implement source fetcher: download/clone OpenClaw source at configured version to a local cache directory
Implement version pinning: store pinned OpenClaw version in ClawHQ config; reject builds that would use a different version without explicit override
Implement integrity verification: checksum or GPG signature check on downloaded source
Implement source cache management: detect when cached source matches pinned version (skip re-download)
Add doctor check: pinned OpenClaw version is available and verified
Surface current OpenClaw version in `clawhq status` output
acceptanceCriteria: ClawHQ can acquire OpenClaw source at a pinned version without manual intervention
Source integrity is verified before use (checksum or signature)
Re-download is skipped when cached source matches pinned version
Version mismatch between pinned and cached source produces a clear error with fix instructions
Doctor reports OpenClaw source availability and version
